ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "site" TEXT /* Location where the complaint was filed */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the complaint */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the officer involved */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the complaint */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the complaint (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "complainant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the complainant */,
  "complainant_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the complainant to the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint being investigated */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the investigator handling the case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the investigation ended */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the investigation */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the investigation (e.g., sustained, not sustained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the investigator */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investigator */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complainants" (
  "complainant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complainant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the complainant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the complainant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the complainant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the complainant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complainant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., misconduct, use of force) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retention_policy" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the investigation (e.g., sustained, not sustained) */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period for records associated with this outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated complaint */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, update) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint associated with the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the complaint documentation */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_files_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, officer, investigator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint being modified */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user making the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigation_timeline" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeline entry */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigation */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Description of the milestone (e.g., 'initial interview', 'final report') */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id")
)
